vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on Backup shadow File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /etc/shadow-, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0000 /etc/shadow-

triage_decision.reason: The remediation only changes permissions on a backup copy of the shadow file, which does not affect active authentication mechanisms. Adjusting file permissions is a standard STIG hardening step and carries minimal risk of lockout or service disruption.
